mapper.select: SELECT T.STOCK_ID, S.STOCK_NAME, T.TRADE_CATEGORY, T.TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE, T.TRADE_COUNT, T.STOCK_PRICE, T.AFTER_BALANCE, T.TRADE_DATE FROM (SELECT USER_ID, STOCK_ID, TRADE_CATEGORY, TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_COUNT, STOCK_PRICE, AFTER_BALANCE, TRADE_DATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TRADE_DATE DESC) AS "RANK" FROM TRADE_HISTORIES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TRADE_DATE DESC) T JOIN STOCKS S ON T.STOCK_ID = S.STOCK_ID WHERE T."RANK" BETWEEN #{pageReq.start} AND #{pageReq.end} ORDER BY T.TRADE_DATE DESC
